one_liner: Zoho CRM offers a broad, mature REST API (v8) with OAuth2 authentication, self-serve developer registration, official SDKs, and both official and community MCP servers, making it buildable now for AI-agent toolkits.

auth_methods.notes: Standard OAuth2 grant/access/refresh token flow via Zoho API Console; also supports Self Client (server-side, no redirect) and Client Credentials flow for machine-to-machine use. Access token passed as 'Zoho-oauthtoken {access_token}' header.

self_serve_notes: Developers can self-register clients at api-console.zoho.com and use free Developer Edition (free forever, dev/testing only) or Free Edition (3 users, 5,000 API credits/day, concurrency 5). Additional API credits purchasable pay-as-you-go via API Dashboard for production use.

api_surface.notes: Extensive REST API (v8) covering CRM modules, metadata, customization, workflow automation, plus official SDKs (Python, Node.js, PHP, Java, C#, Ruby, Scala, TypeScript, JavaScript) and OpenAPI spec available.

evidence.supports: OAuth2 authorization request flow (grant tokens, self-client, client credentials)
Self-serve client registration via Zoho API Console, SDK usage, OAuth2 token handling
Free edition for up to 3 users
API credit limits and purchase details
Full OpenAPI 3.0 spec covering broad REST API surface including modules, fields, layouts, metadata

flags: MCP servers exist both officially (Zoho-hosted, four pre-built servers) and via open-source community projects (Python/Node.js), per search summary though not independently verified via a dedicated Zoho MCP doc URL in evidence.
Production API usage requires a paid Zoho CRM plan beyond the free/dev edition once credit limits are exceeded.
